text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes... One of my classmates recommended a
book to me, and it was just so engaging...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was planning to work my way through it
gradually, but before I knew it, the sun had
risen...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's about an Umamusume who gets reincarnated
as the princess of an enormous kingdom... I
wonder what'll happen next...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion wanders off like she's in a world of
her own.
